name: Choice Band
description: 1.5× Attack, locked into one move
officialDescription: Raises a move’s power, but permits only that move.

name: Choice Specs
description: 1.5× Sp. Atk, locked into one move
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These distinctive glasses boost Sp. Atk, but allow only one kind of move to be used.

name: Choice Scarf
description: 1.5× Speed, locked into one move
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This scarf boosts Speed, but allows the use of only one kind of move.

name: Sitrus Berry
description: Restores 25% HP when below 50%
officialDescription: A hold item that restores 30 HP in battle.

name: Lum Berry
description: Cures any status condition once
officialDescription: A hold item that heals status in battle.

name: Life Orb
description: 1.3× damage, lose 10% HP per attack
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of moves, but at the cost of some HP on each hit.

name: Expert Belt
description: 1.2× damage on super effective hits
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of supereffective moves.

name: Metronome
description: Boosts repeated moves up to 2×
officialDescription: A Pokémon hold item that boosts a move used consecutively. Its effect is reset if another move is used.

name: Shell Bell
description: Heals 1/8 of damage dealt
officialDescription: A hold item that restores HP upon striking the foe.

name: Muscle Band
description: 1.1× physical move damage
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a headband that slightly boosts the power of physical moves.

name: Wise Glasses
description: 1.1× special move damage
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a thick pair of glasses that slightly boosts the power of special moves.

name: Scope Lens
description: +1 critical hit ratio
officialDescription: A hold item that raises the critical- hit rate.

name: Razor Claw
description: +1 critical hit ratio
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a sharply hooked claw that ups the holder’s critical-hit ratio.

name: Throat Spray
description: +1 Sp. Atk after using a sound move
officialDescription: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.

name: Punching Glove
description: 1.1× punching moves, no contact
officialDescription: 1.1× punching moves, no contact

name: Flame Orb
description: Burns the holder at the end of the turn
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that inflicts a burn on the holder in battle.

name: Toxic Orb
description: Badly poisons the holder at the end of the turn
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that badly poisons the holder in battle.

name: Leftovers
description: Restores 1/16 HP each turn
officialDescription: A hold item that gradually restores HP in battle.

name: Rocky Helmet
description: Deals 1/6 HP to attacker on contact
officialDescription: If the holder of this item takes damage, the attacker will also be damaged upon contact.

name: Assault Vest
description: 1.5× Sp. Def, can only use attacks
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This offensive vest raises Sp. Def but prevents the use of status moves.

name: Focus Sash
description: Survives a KO hit with 1 HP (once)
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If it has full HP, the holder will endure one potential KO attack, leaving 1 HP.

name: Eviolite
description: 1.5× Def and Sp. Def if not fully evolved
officialDescription: A mysterious evolutionary lump. When held, it raises the Defense and Sp. Def of a Pokémon that can still evolve.

name: Safety Goggles
description: Immune to weather and powder moves
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These goggles protect the holder from both weather-related damage and powder.

name: Light Clay
description: Extends Light Screen/Reflect to 8 turns
officialDescription: A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of barrier moves like Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder.

name: Wide Lens
description: 1.1× accuracy
officialDescription: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

name: Covert Cloak
description: Blocks secondary effects of moves
officialDescription: Blocks secondary effects of moves

description: Prevents stat lowering by opponents
officialDescription: Prevents stat lowering by opponents

description: Copies opponent's stat boosts once
officialDescription: Copies opponent's stat boosts once
